/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/testLLM.dir/testLLM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testLLM.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/util/myLog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testLLM.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/DeepSeekProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testLLM.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/OllamaLLMProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testLLM.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/LLMManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/testLLM.dir/mnt/ssd/chat_holmes/sdk/src/SessionManager.cpp.o -o testLLM  -ljsoncpp -lfmt -lspdlog -lgtest /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lsqlite3
